title: cyclosorus cocoslyrus
intro: Cyclosorus cocoslyrus, also known as the Chinese brake fern, is a species of fern found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus cocoslyrus include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Cyclosorus cocoslyrus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a variety of ailments.
